area_anchor: Brikette — New cursor pagination and Prime messaging routes have no automated tests
current_truth: The cursor-based pagination endpoint, Prime action routes, and the analytics endpoint were added without corresponding test coverage. Edge cases like boundary cursors, Prime-specific status transitions, and analytics date range validation are untested.
next_scope_now: Add tests for cursor pagination (boundary, concurrent insert), Prime action routes (status transitions, error cases), and analytics endpoint (date validation, metric filtering).
evidence_refs: operator-stated: missing tests for cursor pagination and Prime routes
why: Several new features — paginated message loading, Prime messaging actions, and the analytics dashboard — were shipped without tests. Without tests, future changes could break these features and nobody would know until staff hit the problem.

intended_outcome.statement: Cursor pagination, Prime action routes, and analytics endpoint have test coverage for core paths and edge cases.
